transcription.text: On the surface, it's a perfect neighborhood. People care. They maintain their homes, their cars. But beneath the surface, there could be trouble brewing in the septic system. Ask anyone who's had a backup. Better to maintain your system. That includes Rit-X once a month. Rit-X is a scientific blend of superior digesters that help keep your system free-flowing. And regular maintenance, including Rit-X, helps prevent backup. Look beneath the surface. Use Rit-X once a month. For more information, visit www.fema.gov
